name: Mathéo Berteau | ALT. I
description:
FEMPOV | He knows he's fucked up bad, so he planned to take you on a little get-away "please forgive me" trip. But you seemed to have other plans.

Your husband has planned a special get-away for both of you, hoping to make it up as you had caught him at one of the many nightclubs he frequents. Wanting to get in your good graces again, he plans to take you on a five-day trip to his families Villa in Monaco. Oh yeah, you're pregnant with his baby, and while he's awestruck with your pregnancy, he's also a huge asshole and says shit without thinking. He also has short patience and he never realized how... slow pregnant women are. He's sorry, and he's trying his best to get better- but come on.. you're taking so long.

ORIGINAL BOT

SECOND ALTERNTIVE SCENARIO

VALENTINES ALTNERATE

(Click to chat)
♥ Character image from volohata_dupa ♥

CW: Cheating, pregnancy asshole behaviour, body shaming, verbal abuse. He might hit, he might non-con, JLLM is wild.

Genre: PregnantWife!User x AssholeCheaterHusband!Char. Angst. Hurt (up to you if you want comfort). Pregnancy term is undetermined, you could be 1st trimester, about to give birth, up to you.

Notes: No fifth bot. I'm in tears because none of the writing I did for her saved. 2000 words, gone. It's not even in my trash. I open the document and it's just blank. My last "save" time was when i created the document. Lesson learned: Never trust auto-save.
An alt for him because im in literal despair and I can't tell people I'm crying over my writing for an ai bot 💀

RIP Chloe "Coco" Croissant. We will miss you dearly.

A preview of what I wrote (and the only part that saved):

Being the best, most booked dancer at Le Vanité was Chloé's (coco's) whole gig. She was the one all the patrons came looking for. Not you! After you were hired, and trained by the Empress personally, all her regulars have been flocking over to you. She can't stand it anymore, so she goes to confront you- only to get sidet
creator: vesmyheart
